scenario.name: gamma-frontend-reinspect
scenario.description: Gamma 프론트엔드 재조사. 이전 13빌드 실패. 프론트엔드 변경 여부 및 새로운 경고 전달 경로 탐색.

steps.action: Open Chrome DevTools Console+Network tab. Navigate to https://gamma.app. Create new presentation. Wait for editor to load.

In the AI prompt area, type '고양이에 대한 3장짜리 발표자료 만들어줘' and submit. Watch Network tab carefully. Record ALL requests that appear during generation: URL, type, status, content-type. Especially note if there are any NEW endpoints not seen before (non ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/generation).

Check Console tab for any error handling code. Look for: try-catch blocks, error boundary messages, 'Unable to complete request' source. This tells us how Gamma handles errors from the generation API.

Check if Gamma now uses any different response format. In Network tab, click on the ai/v2/generation request. Check Response tab: is it still SSE (text/event-stream)? Or has it changed to JSON, WebSocket, etc?

expected_output.error_handling: How does Gamma handle generation failures?
expected_output.new_warning_paths: Any new endpoints or mechanisms discovered?

notes: 13빌드 시도 후 BLOCKED_ONLY. 프론트엔드 업데이트로 에러 처리 방식이 변경되었을 가능성 확인.
